name: Tomato Stack Salad with Roasted Tomato Vinaigrette and Fried Green Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 beef steak tomato, cut into 6 slices
1 yellow beef steak tomato, cut into 6 slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Toss Roma tomatoes with olive oil and Essential Oil. Place seed side down on a baking sheet.
3. Roast for 8-10 minutes, then remove from oven and let cool.
4. Julienne the cooled tomatoes.
5. In a mixing bowl, whisk together extra-virgin olive oil, balsamic vinegar, garlic, basil chiffonade, and red onion slices.
6. Add julienned tomatoes to the vinaigrette and season with salt and pepper.
7. Season each side of tomato slices and mozzarella slices with salt and pepper.
8. Toss greens with 2/3 of the vinaigrette; reserve remaining dressing.
9. Assemble salads by layering alternating slices of tomatoes, cheese, and greens. Use 3 tomato slices and 1 cup greens per salad.
10. Garnish each serving with a fried green tomato, drizzle with remaining vinaigrette, sprinkle black pepper on the rim, add parsley and edible flowers.
Yield: 4 servings
